referenceSource.note: cor.test(c(5,5,5,5,5), c(1,2,3,4,5)) returns r=NA, p=NA. SD(x)=0 → division by zero.

description: Pearson correlation with zero-variance x (all identical values). SD=0 causes division by zero in correlation formula.

datasets.name: constant_x
datasets.source: synthetic: x is constant (all 5.0), y is normal

cases.description: Pearson correlation with zero-variance x (should return null/NaN, not crash)
